query: SELECT DATE(checkInAt) as checkin_date, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(guestName SEPARATOR ', ') as names FROM guestSessions WHERE rollerBookingRef IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE(checkInAt) ORDER BY checkin_date DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KjT5kGWaGHMws6.75433b4e530a --database aMDMXCoQ2ycSYTjhkKKJzm --execute SELECT DATE(checkInAt) as checkin_date, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(guestName SEPARATOR ', ') as names FROM guestSessions WHERE rollerBookingRef IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE(checkInAt) ORDER BY checkin_date DESC LIMIT 10;
